## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the build process for CVE pages and coordinate next steps for implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcus will develop a workflow to pull, process, and publish CVE data, starting with a sample CVE to test the process](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Updates to CVE pages will need to be manually triggered by GrowthX, with potential for future automation](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [First CVE page expected to be ready by end of day, pending successful data retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [FOSSA team to provide more clarity on design and publishing process after internal engineering discussion](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

## Topics

### CVE Page Template and Data Sourcing

  - [Template shared by Aida contains necessary information](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Data to be pulled from three websites via APIs or scraping](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Challenge: Ensuring accurate extraction of all details, especially security metrics](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Goal: Find a CVE example with comprehensive information to populate the full template](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

### Data Refresh Process

  - [GrowthX to manually trigger updates initially](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Potential for daily automated checks for changes in source data](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Ideal scenario: Set up notifications for updates to trigger corresponding changes](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Need to monitor all three source websites for complete updates](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Marcus aims to have first CVE page ready by end of day, pending successful data retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Andy to discuss design and publishing process with FOSSA engineers](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Consideration of GitHub integration for content management](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)

### Ongoing Partnership and Additional Support

  - [GrowthX team (Jakub/Aida) offering continued support for the next month](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [Focus on wrapping up existing projects and identifying areas for additional assistance](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Emphasis on completing CWE series publication](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Acknowledgment of challenges due to lack of CMS, working on solutions](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=677.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcus to complete first CVE page build and share results](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Andy to discuss design and publishing process with FOSSA engineers and provide updates](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Team to identify and prioritize additional projects for completion within the partnership timeframe](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Continue work on publishing CWE series](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)
  - [Maintain open communication for ad-hoc support and project completion](https://fathom.video/share/skia-8xA4yYk6FnjDji39cfnxsBxzvRz?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
